title: Quarto report site (reproducible)
context: A reproducible Quarto report site rebuilds from source in CI with every figure/table traceable to provenance, carrying prominent research-not-medical-advice framing (PLAN §8 M3). Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Build a Quarto report site that rebuilds from source in CI, traces every figure/table to a provenance manifest, and carries research-only framing plus full citations.
acceptanceCriteria: Report site rebuilds from source in CI; every figure/table traces to a provenance manifest.
Prominent 'research, not medical advice' framing; full data + software citations.
No restricted-source bytes embedded in the site.
output: docs/report-site/ (reproducible Quarto report site rebuilt in CI).
